notes: Hellfire Arrows can be found in Shadow Chests and Pots in The Underworld , crafted at an anvil , or purchased from the Demolitionist for 1 SC each in Hardmode .

conditions: Hemopiranha are a type of fish which are found uncommonly by fishing in the Crimson in any layer. They are used to craft Seafood Dinners and Rage Potions .

The Herb Bag is a consumable grab bag item, which when opened with ⚷ Open / Activate from within the player's inventory , contains 2–40 herbs and/or herb seeds . Herb Bags can be found in Chests on the surface .

notes: The Hercules Beetle is a Hardmode , post- Plantera accessory that increases the damage of summon weapons by 15% and increases their knockback by 2. [ 1 ] The Hercules Beetle can be purchased from the Witch Doctor for 40 GC if he is spoken to in the Jungle after Plantera has been defeated.

conditions: The Hermes Boots are a pre-Hardmode accessory that can be found in Chests in the Underground and Cavern layers. While equipped, they grant the ability to sprint , allowing the player to reach maximum running speed faster, and they increase the player's maximum movement speed to 31 mph (22.73 tiles/second). The player will leave behind a visual trail of dust clouds as they sprint.

notes: The HiTek Sunglasses are a Hardmode , post- Golem vanity item for the social helmet slot. They are similar to the Sunglasses and Goggles , in that they provide eye graphics without concealing the player's hair. HiTek Sunglasses are purchased from the Cyborg for 5 GC , after the Martian Madness event has been defeated.

The Honey Dispenser is a crafting station used to craft Honey furniture out of Honey Blocks . The Honey Dispenser has a 1/4 (25%) chance of being obtained from Ivy Chests in the Underground Jungle . On the Desktop version , Console version , and Mobile version , it can also be purchased from the Steampunker for 10 GC in the Jungle .

conditions: The Honeyfin can only be fished from honey , e.g. in Bee Hives within the Underground Jungle . Other than the Bumblebee Tuna that can be found during Angler quests, Honeyfins are the only fish that can be caught in honey.

quantityText: Ice Bow (If Remix seed is not active)
Ice Bow (If Remix seed is active)

conditions: Each Frozen Chest will always contain one primary item, and can potentially contain multiple secondary items, or none at all. Besides one of the items listed here, they will also contain common items depending on the height they were found: Surface , Underground or Caverns . If found in the Underground or Cavern layer, it will contain Ice Torches instead of normal Torches . It has a 1/5 (20%) chance to contain a Deer Thing if found in the Cavern layer, replacing the normal chance for a Cavern chest to contain a Suspicious Looking Eye .

notes: The Ice Machine is a crafting station used to craft Frozen furniture out of Ice Blocks and Snow furniture out of Snow Blocks . The Ice Machine has a 1/7 (14.29%) chance of being obtained from Frozen Chests in the Ice biome . On Desktop version , Console version , and Mobile version , it can also be purchased from the Steampunker for 10 GC while in the Snow biome .

The Ice Rod is a Hardmode magic weapon that autofires blocks of ice, which have the unique ability of placing solid, temporary Ice Blocks at the location of the cursor and which last for 15 seconds before shattering. These Ice Blocks are translucent, cast a dim, flickering blue light, and are slippery like normal Ice Blocks . The Ice Rod can be purchased from the Wizard for 50 GC .

quantityText: 2–5 (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) / 3–6 (Old-gen console and 3DS versions)

notes: The Imbuing Station is a crafting station used to craft flasks . It is purchased from the Witch Doctor for 7 GC .

conditions: Iridescent Brick is a cheap brick . It can be mined with any pickaxe or drill . It and its walls can either be crafted, or collected from Jungle Shrines in the Underground Jungle .

The Iridescent Brick Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in Jungle Shrines in some worlds. It drops as an item when destroyed, and can also be obtained via crafting. It is always considered a safe wall .

Iron Ore is a pre-Hardmode ore . It spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers , and occasionally on the surface . Iron Ore also has a small chance to appear as a bonus drop from slimes . It can be obtained from all types of crates .
The Ivy Chest is a chest storage item found only in Jungle Shrines and Living Mahogany Trees in the Underground Jungle .

Each Ivy Chest will always contain one primary item, and can potentially contain multiple secondary items, or none at all. Besides one of the items listed here, they will also contain common items depending on the height they were found: Underground or Caverns .
